# PRSense Workspace Instructions

- Keep the project production-ready and avoid placeholder comments or stub implementations.
- Preserve the two-layer analysis pipeline: browser static analysis first, Gemini analysis in parallel, then merged results.
- Prefer small, focused edits that improve readability, reliability, and maintainability.
- Keep backend code CommonJS and frontend code ESM unless there is a strong reason to change it.
- Validate changes with the narrowest useful build or diagnostics step before broadening scope.
- Keep UI changes aligned with the dark-first PRSense design system and accessibility requirements.
- When adding code, prefer clear control flow, explicit names, and reusable helpers over duplication.
